project.name: EduPilot Teacher Management Dashboard
project.domain: AI-powered teacher management dashboard for Malaysian schools
project.mission: Help Malaysian teachers plan lessons, record PBD evidence, manage timetables, analyze student performance, and generate AI-assisted teaching artifacts with minimal administrative friction.

stack_overview.frontend: React/Vite today, scalable to route-based React architecture
stack_overview.ai: Gemini primary with OpenAI-compatible fallback path
stack_overview.storage: Local/upload service now, object storage recommended for production
stack_overview.deployment: Single web app during MVP, separable services later

current_shape.routing: Client state page switching in current prototype
current_shape.api_base_strategy: Use backend origin in production and http://localhost:3000 during Vite dev

recommended_structure.src/app: Application shell, route registration, global providers
recommended_structure.src/features/lesson-planner: RPH generator forms, result preview, export actions
recommended_structure.src/features/pbd: PBD key-in, assessment records, evidence, reports
recommended_structure.src/features/timetable: Weekly schedule, period editing, lesson linking
recommended_structure.src/features/materials: Material upload, repository, tagging, lesson attachment
recommended_structure.src/features/copilot: AI chat, contextual actions, prompt history
recommended_structure.src/features/rubrics: Rubric templates, criteria editor, TP mapping
recommended_structure.src/shared/api: Typed API clients and response mappers
recommended_structure.src/shared/state: Global app state and cache helpers

layout_system.shell: Sticky sidebar, top bar, content canvas, floating AI copilot
layout_system.navigation: Overview, Lesson Planner, PBD, Timetable, Materials, Analytics, Reports, Settings
layout_system.responsive_strategy: Desktop persistent sidebar, mobile drawer navigation
layout_system.design_language: Neutral SaaS dashboard, glass surfaces, high-density cards, restrained gradients

state_management.current: React useState/useEffect for page state, form state, generated lesson result, PBD rows, timetable slots
state_management.recommended: TanStack Query for server cache, Zustand or React context for UI shell state, URL routes for deep links

responsibilities: Expose REST endpoints for lesson planning, PBD, schedule, documents, evaluation, assessment, student records and users
Call AI providers through aiProvider service
Normalize AI output into stable application objects
Generate document exports for lesson plans

services.aiProvider: Provider adapter for Gemini and OpenAI-style AI requests
services.pedagogyEngine: Prompt construction, lesson generation, analysis, improvement, simulation, evaluation normalization
services.fileText: PDF/DOCX/TXT extraction for uploaded evidence or lesson analysis
services.sowLibrary: KPM default Scheme of Work context and custom SOW instruction builders
services.kssrAnalyzer: Heuristic KSSR alignment checks and prompt requirements

scalability_notes: Move AI generation to a job queue for long-running generation and retry behavior
Separate upload/document processing from the core API when file volume grows
Introduce typed request validation with Zod or Joi
Add route-level RBAC middleware before multi-school deployment
Add audit logging for generated reports, evidence uploads and admin edits

tables.name: Users
tables.scalability_notes: Use compound schoolId + role indexes for multi-school dashboards.

tables.name: Classes
tables.scalability_notes: Classes should become the core tenancy boundary for teacher-level data views.

tables.name: Students
tables.scalability_notes: Keep sensitive student data separated from analytics aggregates where possible.

tables.name: Subjects
tables.scalability_notes: Version standards by curriculum year to keep historical lesson plans stable.

tables.name: LessonPlans
tables.scalability_notes: Store AI output in generatedFields but expose stable normalized fields for querying.

tables.name: Assessments
tables.scalability_notes: Consider separate AssessmentRecords collection when rows become large.

tables.name: Rubrics
tables.scalability_notes: Version rubric templates to preserve past assessment meaning.

tables.name: Schedules
tables.scalability_notes: Separate recurring Periods from dated schedule instances for calendar accuracy.

tables.name: Materials
tables.scalability_notes: Move binaries to object storage and keep metadata in MongoDB.

tables.name: EvaluationForms
tables.scalability_notes: Keep annotation ranges stable if document editing becomes collaborative.

tables.name: Analytics
tables.scalability_notes: Use precomputed aggregates and background jobs for large schools.

pipeline: Context injection from KSSR, SOW, class profile, PBD records and materials

prompt_context.curriculum: KSSR, DSKP, learning standards, Scheme of Work
prompt_context.classroom: Year, class name, number of pupils, mixed ability needs
prompt_context.evidence: PBD records, TP distribution, uploaded classroom evidence
prompt_context.teacher_preferences: Template type, lesson flow, materials, assessment type

token_optimization: Send summarized class analytics instead of raw student rows when possible
Use stable prompt templates with compact JSON schemas
Cache generated rubric templates by subject, year and skill
Store normalized AI output to avoid re-generating unchanged artifacts
Use retrieval filters before injecting materials or evidence text
security_notes: Never send unnecessary guardian contact or sensitive demographics to AI
Redact student identifiers for aggregate analytics prompts
Log prompt metadata without storing full sensitive prompt bodies by default
Add admin controls for AI provider selection and data retention

features.name: AI Lesson Planner
features.purpose: Generate KSSR-aligned RPH lesson plans from teacher inputs and classroom context.

features.name: PBD System
features.purpose: Record classroom assessment evidence, TP levels and teacher comments.

features.name: Rubric Builder
features.purpose: Create reusable criteria and TP descriptors for skill-based assessment.

features.name: Timetable Planner
features.purpose: Manage recurring and dated class periods, link lessons and spot missing RPH.

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.purpose: Transform PBD and exam records into actionable teaching insights.

features.name: Material Repository
features.purpose: Store, tag and attach teaching files, worksheets, slides, audio and evidence.

features.name: Evaluation Forms
features.purpose: Capture lesson reflection, annotations and improvement feedback after teaching.

features.name: AI Copilot
features.purpose: Provide contextual help across lesson planning, PBD, analytics and reporting.

components.name: LessonPreview
responsibilities: Render AI-generated objectives, criteria, activities, assessment, differentiation and procedure

state_management.current_pattern: Local React state in page components

global_state.backendStatus: Health result displayed in top bar

recommended_evolution: Use URL routing for page state
Use TanStack Query for server data and invalidation
Use optimistic updates for timetable and PBD tables
Persist unsaved RPH drafts in localStorage or IndexedDB

workflows.name: Teacher Workflow
workflows.success_metric: Teacher can move from timetable to lesson to PBD evidence without re-entering context.

workflows.name: Admin Workflow
workflows.success_metric: Admin sees school-wide progress and identifies support needs quickly.

workflows.name: AI Workflow
workflows.success_metric: AI output is normalized, traceable, editable and persisted.

frontend: Keep feature modules isolated by domain
Prefer explicit prop names over generic data blobs
Keep AI response rendering defensive against missing fields
Avoid duplicate mixed-language labels unless product intentionally supports bilingual mode
backend: Validate all route bodies before database writes
Normalize all AI responses before returning to frontend
Keep provider-specific AI code inside aiProvider service
Use lean queries for read-heavy dashboards
Add structured errors with stable error codes
data: Use schoolId/classId as multi-tenant query anchors
Keep large evidence files out of MongoDB
Avoid storing raw prompts containing sensitive student information
testing: Smoke test health, generate, lesson fetch, schedule overview and document export
Use browser checks for no horizontal overflow and no dead primary buttons

principles: Calm SaaS dashboard over decorative landing page
Dense but readable cards for teacher workflow
Clear status chips for Ready, Needs RPH, PBD due, Needs support
AI insights must be visible and actionable, never hidden behind only a chat widget
patterns: Top search and quick create action

nodes.label: AI Teacher Management Platform
nodes.description: Central operating system for Malaysian teacher planning, PBD evidence, analytics, AI assistance and reporting.

nodes.label: Frontend System
nodes.description: Interactive dashboard, navigation shell, pages, forms, tables, charts, uploads and AI copilot surface.

nodes.label: Pages
nodes.description: Route-level or page-level screens that frame each teacher workflow.

nodes.label: Dashboard Page
nodes.description: Daily command center showing schedule, AI insights, English goals and recent materials.

nodes.label: Lesson Planner Page
nodes.description: RPH generation form and generated lesson preview.

nodes.label: Input RPH Form
nodes.description: Collects subject, year, skill, topic, objectives, materials, assessment type and classroom context.

nodes.label: PBD Page
nodes.description: Assessment overview, key-in table, rubrics, portfolio, UASA and AI analysis tabs.

nodes.label: PBD Key-in Table
nodes.description: Editable rows for attendance, score, TP level, comments and evidence actions.

nodes.label: Timetable Page
nodes.description: Weekly schedule grid, RPH attention panel and period actions.

nodes.label: State Management
nodes.description: Client state for active page, theme, copilot, forms, timetable slots, PBD rows and server cache.

nodes.label: Hooks & Utilities
nodes.description: Reusable frontend logic for API calls, media queries, local drafts, uploads and filters.

nodes.label: Layouts
nodes.description: App shell, sidebar, topbar, page header, dashboard canvas and responsive mobile drawer.

nodes.label: Shared Components
nodes.description: Reusable UI primitives used by page modules, including cards, tables, badges, panels, charts and forms.

nodes.label: Lesson Preview Component
nodes.description: Renders normalized AI output into objectives, success criteria, activities, assessment, differentiation and procedure cards.

nodes.label: AI Copilot UI
nodes.description: Floating contextual assistant panel that surfaces recommendations and routes teachers to the next best action.

nodes.label: Backend System
nodes.description: Express API, controllers, services, persistence, AI orchestration, exports and upload processing.

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: REST route boundary for health, generation, lesson plans, schedules, PBD, documents and analytics actions.

nodes.label: Controllers
nodes.description: Thin route handlers that validate requests, call services and return stable JSON contracts.

nodes.label: POST /generate
nodes.description: Creates an AI-generated lesson plan, normalizes the response and persists a LessonPlan record.

nodes.label: /lesson-plans Routes
nodes.description: List, read, update and delete generated or edited lesson plans.

nodes.label: /schedule Routes
nodes.description: Manage overview, periods, links and dated schedule items.

nodes.label: /assessment Routes
nodes.description: Create and retrieve PBD assessment records, rubric-linked scores and evidence metadata.

nodes.label: /documents Routes
nodes.description: Generate DOCX/PDF exports and extract text from uploaded lesson or evidence files.

nodes.label: AI Analysis Routes
nodes.description: Analyze, improve, simulate, evaluate and KSSR-check lesson plans through the AI system.

nodes.label: Shared Services
nodes.description: Domain services for pedagogy, AI provider calls, file text extraction, DOCX generation, KSSR analysis and database access.

nodes.label: Queue System
nodes.description: Future background worker layer for long AI jobs, document exports, analytics aggregation and notifications.

nodes.label: AI System
nodes.description: Prompt orchestration, provider abstraction, context injection, safety, structured formatting and retry logic.

nodes.label: Prompt Builder
nodes.description: Builds task-specific prompts with schema requirements, KSSR constraints and teacher context.

nodes.label: Context Injection
nodes.description: Injects curriculum, class profile, PBD evidence, materials, timetable and teacher preferences into prompts.

nodes.label: RPH Generation
nodes.description: Generates document-ready lesson details, objectives, success criteria, activities, assessment, differentiation and procedure.

nodes.label: AI Analytics Insights
nodes.description: Turns PBD aggregates and skill gaps into teacher-readable intervention recommendations.

nodes.label: AI Provider Abstraction
nodes.description: Separates Gemini/OpenAI details from feature services and supports fallback provider selection.

nodes.label: Structured Output Formatting
nodes.description: Repairs, validates and normalizes model responses into stable JSON shapes before frontend rendering or database writes.

nodes.label: Database System
nodes.description: MongoDB collections, relationships, indexes, permission mapping and analytics aggregation inputs.

nodes.label: LessonPlans Collection
nodes.description: Stores AI-generated and edited RPH records, normalized fields, generatedFields and schedule links.

nodes.label: Assessments Collection
nodes.description: Stores PBD assessment records, scores, TP levels, rubric links and evidence pointers.

nodes.label: Authentication & Security
nodes.description: Identity, teacher/admin/panel access control, tenant permissions, upload rules, AI privacy and audit logging.

nodes.label: File & Media Storage
nodes.description: Materials, evidence files, generated DOCX/PDF exports, extracted text and future object storage mapping.

nodes.label: Analytics Engine
nodes.description: Aggregates PBD records, assessment scores, evidence and lesson outcomes into insights and intervention plans.

nodes.label: Scheduling System
nodes.description: Timetable periods, schedule import, RPH attention states, lesson plan linking and conflict checks.

nodes.label: PBD Assessment Engine
nodes.description: Assessment templates, rubrics, score mapping, TP calculation, evidence, history and AI intervention suggestions.

nodes.label: Lesson Planning Engine
nodes.description: RPH generation, lesson edit lifecycle, schedule linking, document export and material attachment.

nodes.label: Evaluation & Forms Engine
nodes.description: Post-lesson reflection, annotated critique, improvement suggestions and panel review pathways.

nodes.label: Notification System
nodes.description: Future reminder and workflow notification layer for missing RPH, pending PBD, reports and admin review.

nodes.label: Admin Management
nodes.description: Teacher management, school dashboards, panel review, exports, permissions and performance monitoring.

nodes.label: Reporting & Export System
nodes.description: PDF/DOCX/CSV reports for RPH, PBD, class analytics, parent summaries and admin reporting.

nodes.label: Future Scalability Layer
nodes.description: Enterprise extensions for multi-school deployment, parent/student portals, mobile, offline, real-time and integrations.

nodes.label: Teacher Creates Lesson → Evidence → Analytics
nodes.description: Teacher creates lesson plan, links timetable, records PBD, uploads evidence, receives analytics and AI recommendations.

nodes.label: AI Orchestration Flow
nodes.description: User prompt passes through prompt engine, context injection, provider adapter, formatter, database persistence and UI display.

recommended_folder_structure.frontend/src/shared: Shared components, API client, utilities and hooks
recommended_folder_structure.backend/services: Business logic, AI, exports, file parsing
recommended_folder_structure.backend/jobs: Future background jobs for AI and analytics
recommended_folder_structure.backend/policies: Future auth, RBAC, data access policies

scaling_strategy: Keep monolith until product flows stabilize
Extract AI generation into an async job service when generation load increases
Extract file processing into a worker service when uploads grow
Precompute analytics aggregates nightly and after assessment saves
Add tenant-aware indexes before onboarding multiple schools

future_microservice_separation.ai-service: Prompt orchestration, provider adapters, response normalization

caching_recommendations: Cache lesson plan lists by teacherId and subject
Cache generated rubric templates by subject/year/skill
Invalidate lesson cache after generation or update
Use CDN/object storage cache for materials
ai_token_optimization: Summarize PBD rows before sending to AI
Store normalized generated results and reuse them
Prefer IDs and aggregate metrics over raw student profiles
security_concerns: Enforce teacher can only access assigned classes
Protect student PII and guardian contact data
Validate uploads and restrict file types
Audit admin exports and report downloads
Redact sensitive information before AI calls
performance_bottlenecks: Large PBD tables with many students
reusable_patterns: Feature-owned state with shared API clients
Normalize backend responses before UI rendering
Use status chips and action panels for teacher next steps
Use AI insight cards with route actions
conventions: Use English labels when product mode is English-only
Use KSSR/PBD terminology consistently in domain data
Use ObjectId references for cross-collection links
Prefer explicit skill fields for English analytics
